name: feishu-bot
description: Lightweight Feishu long-connection bot for SmartKit bridge.

scripts.dev:mac: pnpm rebuild:native:node && pnpm build && swift run --package-path macos/FeishuBotApp
scripts.build:mac: pnpm build && swift build --package-path macos/FeishuBotApp -c release
scripts.start:mac: pnpm rebuild:native:node && pnpm build && swift run --package-path macos/FeishuBotApp -c release
scripts.package:mac: pnpm build && swift build --package-path macos/FeishuBotApp -c release && node scripts/package-native-mac-app.mjs
scripts.dev:mac:electron: pnpm rebuild:native:electron && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=true concurrently "pnpm dev" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3179/health && electron electron/main.mjs"
scripts.start:mac:electron: pnpm rebuild:native:electron && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV=false electron electron/main.mjs
scripts.package:mac:electron: pnpm rebuild:native:electron && pnpm build && electron-builder --mac dmg
